## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Augment priorities and upcoming content production.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Top Priority:** Produce one new "First-hand Experience" tool comparison article by EOD Jan 6 to showcase new content for the Jan 7 client call.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [**Production Strategy:** Ismail will produce the high-quality benchmark article manually (outside Atlas) to bypass its iteration and prompt-access limitations.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Team Transition:** A new ME (Emmy) starts today. Marisol will return 5 hrs/wk to support the handover and ensure production continuity during Ismail's upcoming leave.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [**Technical Updates:** Ed is finalizing sensitive Augment redirects for a Jan 7 launch. Liz is pushing engineering to automate Sanity refreshes, unblocking freelancer Isra for manual table work.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)

## Topics

### Client Call Prep (Jan 7)

  - [**Goal:** Showcase new content with TLDRs and FAQs.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [**Priority:** One new "First-hand Experience" tool comparison article.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**Owner:** Ismail](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**Rationale:** More impactful than refreshes; demonstrates new production.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Supporting Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [**Refreshes:** Martha to complete existing content refreshes by EOD Jan 6.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [**Redirects:** Ed to finalize Augment "Moving Guides" redirects for a Jan 7 launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

### Content Production & Quality

  - [**Benchmark Article Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [Ismail will produce the benchmark article manually, outside Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Atlas is difficult for iteration and lacks access to system prompts, which are critical for quality control.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [**Goal:** Establish a high-quality process that engineering can replicate.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [**Sucheta's Content (Surge):**](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [Ismail is reviewing Sucheta's articles to maintain quality.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [**Plan:** Liz will also review to help establish a quality threshold for passing articles, especially during Ismail's leave.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

### Team & Workflow Updates

  - [**New ME (Emmy):**](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Starts today; will own the Augment newsletter.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Onboarding will take a few weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [**Marisol's Return:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
      - [Will work 5 hrs/wk to support Emmy's onboarding and ensure production continuity.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [**Sanity Refreshes:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [Liz is pushing engineering to automate TLDR/FAQ insertion by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This unblocks Isra to focus on the time-consuming manual table work.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Complete 2–3 articles this week before leave.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

  - [**Martha:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [Complete existing content refreshes by EOD Jan 6.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [Begin new tool comparison articles on Jan 7.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**Ed:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [Finalize Augment "Moving Guides" redirects for a Jan 7 launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Await Slack ping from Liz for Data Annotation in-article image task.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [Push engineering to automate Sanity refreshes by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [Arrange Marisol's return (5 hrs/wk) to support Emmy's onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/Hd4AceXU5xcY8s9AjyiKbAUy5cdeSL-r?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
